title: Meaty Dutch Pork Stamppot
description: A hearty, one-pot Dutch dish featuring tender pork, caramelized onions, and a sweet and tangy peach juice sauce.

ingredients.name: pork shoulder
ingredients.notes: choose a fatty cut for optimal flavor

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: caramelize for 20-25 minutes to bring out the sweetness

ingredients.name: peach juice
ingredients.notes: use a good quality, unsweetened juice

ingredients.name: yuzu cure
ingredients.notes: use store-bought or homemade for an authentic flavor

instructions: Heat the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and golden brown.
Add the carrots and potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the peach juice, yuzu cure, flour, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours, or until the pork is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stamppot hot, garnished with fresh parsley or chives if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze leftovers for up to 3 days.
